title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 05 2022
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 05 2022
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 05 2022
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 05/09/2022
DCE iron ore was was shocked and keep upward all the day.The main contract closed at 695,increased of 3.98%. Steel mills are more mainly on the sidelines, and market turnover continues to pick up.PBF at Shandong port dealt 735-745 yuan/mt,increase 15-25 yuan/mt.SSF at Shandong port dealt 635-640 yuan/mt.PBF at Tangshan dealt 750 yuan/mt,increase 30 yuan/mt than yesterday. According to SMM statistics, a total of 180 ships from around the world arrived at China's main ports this week, and the amount of imported minerals increased by 7.23 million tons compared with last week.
